caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering sits at a desk in a studio setting. He has a gold watch on his left wrist and is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features white banners with a logo that reads "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. A blue sign on the wall behind him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black device and a black mug with red text that says "TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, slightly shifting his posture and glancing around the room while resting his hands on the table. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene, highlighting the equipment and the branding of the studio environment.
